NZ.description: New Zealand profile with MSL Stratum 1 national standard pool plus InternetNZ ntp.net.nz city servers; apply MSL and InternetNZ usage policies

AU.description: Australia profile with three tiers: NMI UTC(AUS) servers, university public NTP servers, and AU pool fallback (au.pool plus 0..3)
notes: Tier order: NMI servers first, university servers second, au.pool fallback last (au.pool.ntp.org plus 0..3.au.pool.ntp.org).
University server AUP differs by provider and availability may vary.
Do not override default polling intervals for university servers.
Use iburst consistently for all server entries in this profile.
NMI restricted/traceable services may require registration and static IP.

US.description: United States profile: one random Gaithersburg NIST server, one random Boulder NIST server, plus three US pool fallback servers
notes: Gaithersburg servers (time-[a-d]-g.nist.gov): one selected at random each install run.
Boulder servers (time-[a-c]-b.nist.gov): one selected at random each install run.
Three US pool servers provide fallback diversity.
Replace pool servers with better local servers after ntpq/loopstats review if desired.
